2604.25299.title: The Thinking Pixel: Recursive Sparse Reasoning in Multimodal Diffusion Latents
2604.25299.paper_summary: Diffusion models have achieved success in high-fidelity data synthesis, yet their capacity for more complex, structured reasoning like text following tasks remains constrained. While advances in language models have leveraged strategies such as latent reasoning and recursion to enhance text understanding capabilities, extending these to multimodal text-to-image generation tasks is challenging due to the continuous and non-discrete nature of visual tokens. To tackle this problem, we draw inspiration from modular human cognition and propose a recursive, sparse mixture-of-experts framework integrated into conventional diffusion models. Our approach introduces a recursive component within joint attention layers that iteratively refines visual tokens over multiple latent steps while efficiently sharing parameters via sparse selection of neural modules. At each step, a gating network is devised to dynamically select specialized neural modules, conditioned on the current visual tokens, the diffusion timestep, and the conditioning information. Comprehensive evaluation on class-conditioned ImageNet image generation tasks and additional studies on the GenEval and DPG benchmark demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method in enhancing model image generation performance.
2604.25299.paper_summary_zh: 擴散模型在高保真數據合成方面取得了成功，但它們在更複雜、結構化推理（如文本跟隨任務）方面的能力仍然受到限制。儘管語言模型的進步利用了潛在推理和遞歸等策略來增強文本理解能力，但由於視覺標記的連續性和非離散性，將這些擴展到多模態文本到圖像生成任務中是具有挑戰性的。為了解決這個問題，我們從模塊化的人類認知中獲得靈感，提出了一種遞歸的稀疏專家混合框架，並將其整合到傳統的擴散模型中。我們的方法在聯合注意層內引入了一個遞歸組件，該組件在多個潛在步驟中迭代地精煉視覺標記，同時通過稀疏選擇神經模塊有效地共享參數。在每一步中，設計了一個閘網絡，以根據當前的視覺標記、擴散時間步和條件信息動態選擇專門的神經模塊。對於類別條件的ImageNet圖像生成任務的綜合評估以及對GenEval和DPG基準的額外研究表明，所提出的方法在提高模型圖像生成性能方面具有優越性。
2604.25299.author: Yuwei Sun et.al.
2604.25299.authors: Yuwei Sun, Yuxuan Yao, Hui Li, Siyu Zhu
